---
title: "Organising Comittee"
title-block-banner: "#00000000"
title-block-banner-color: "white"
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>

      #title-block-header {
        background-image: url(images/Glasgow_Cityscape.jpg);
        background-size: cover;
        background-position: center;
        height: 250px;
      }

      /* Title */
      .quarto-title-block .title {
        font-size: 3.5rem !important;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: white;
      }

      /* Subtitle */
      .quarto-title-block .subtitle {
        font-size: 1.6rem !important;
        color: white;
      }

      /* Metadata (if any) */
      #title-block-header.quarto-title-block.default .quarto-title-meta {
        color: white;
      }

      </style>

format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true

editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console

---

## Organising Committee

- [Daniela Castro-Camilo](https://www.gla.ac.uk/schools/mathematicsstatistics/staff/danielacastrocamilo/)
- [Jafet Belmont Osuna](https://www.gla.ac.uk/schools/mathematicsstatistics/staff/jafetbelmontosuna/)
- [Claire Miller](https://www.gla.ac.uk/schools/mathematicsstatistics/staff/clairemiller/)
- [Marian Scott](https://www.gla.ac.uk/schools/mathematicsstatistics/staff/escott/)
- [Craig Wilkie](https://www.gla.ac.uk/schools/mathematicsstatistics/staff/craigwilkie/)
- [Craig Anderson](https://www.gla.ac.uk/schools/mathematicsstatistics/staff/craiganderson/)
- [Duncan Lee](https://www.gla.ac.uk/schools/mathematicsstatistics/staff/duncanlee/)
- [Archer Gong Zhang](https://www.gla.ac.uk/schools/mathematicsstatistics/staff/archergongzhang/)
- [Janine Illian](https://www.gla.ac.uk/schools/mathematicsstatistics/staff/janineillian/)
- [David Bolin](https://www.kaust.edu.sa/en/study/faculty/david-bolin)


## Scientific Committee

- [Marian Scott](https://www.gla.ac.uk/schools/mathematicsstatistics/staff/escott/)
- [Craig Anderson](https://www.gla.ac.uk/schools/mathematicsstatistics/staff/craiganderson/)
- [Janine Illian](https://www.gla.ac.uk/schools/mathematicsstatistics/staff/janinei)
- [Andrew Zammit-Mangion](https://www.unsw.edu.au/staff/andrew-zammit-mangion)
- [Eleni Matechou](https://www.seresearch.qmul.ac.uk/cpsd/people/eatechou/)
